tasks.title: TS-H1.1a Define /pipeline/run validation contract (request/response + error codes)
tasks.description:
Produce explicit contract for POST /api/presentation-studio/decks/{deckId}/pipeline/run including required fields, allowed stages/scope, and deterministic 4xx error model.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Request schema documented with required/optional fields and enums.
- Response schema includes runId, status, timestamps, and echo of validated scope/stages.
- Error matrix covers invalid deckId, invalid scope, invalid stages, duplicate stage names, and malformed payload.

comments.author: sentinel
comments.text: Completed contract artifact: mission-control/review-packets/RP-0020-pipeline-run-validation-contract.md

tasks.title: TS-H1.1b Implement runId + run-record persistence helper
tasks.description:
Add helper for creating pipeline run records with deterministic shape and persistence target.
Acceptance Criteria:
- runId generation format defined and implemented.
- Persisted record contains deckId, scope, stages, status=started, createdAt/updatedAt.
- Helper is unit-testable or smoke-verified with fixture write/read.

comments.author: sentinel
comments.text: Implemented runId + run-record persistence helper, payload normalization, and pipeline run store bootstrap. RP-0021 attached.

tasks.title: TS-H1.1c Wire POST /pipeline/run endpoint + smoke verification
tasks.description:
Implement endpoint using validation + persistence helper and verify with smoke calls.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Valid request returns 201 with runId and started status.
- Invalid request returns 400 with actionable error payload.
- Audit event emitted for pipeline.run.created with runId/deckId metadata.

comments.author: sentinel
comments.text: Wired POST /pipeline/run endpoint and audit event; pending authenticated HTTP smoke (201 + 400 paths) before Ready for Review.

comments.author: sentinel
comments.text: Decomposed remaining smoke closure into TASK-0096 (harness) and TASK-0097 (live authenticated execution evidence). Harness delivered with RP-0026; final close pending session cookie-backed run.
Recovery sweep confirms dependency on TASK-0097 live authenticated smoke evidence before Ready for Review transition.

tasks.title: TS-H1.1c.1 Add reusable authenticated smoke harness script for /pipeline/run
tasks.description:
Create reusable script that exercises 201 valid path and 400 invalid path for POST /pipeline/run with session cookie input.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Script accepts BASE_URL/COOKIE/DECK_ID env vars.
- Valid request path asserts HTTP 201 and prints response body.
- Invalid request path asserts HTTP 400 and prints response body.

comments.author: sentinel
comments.text: Implemented scripts/pipeline-run-smoke.sh and documented in RP-0026.

tasks.title: TS-H1.1c.2 Execute authenticated live smoke (201 + 400) and capture evidence

Run scripts/pipeline-run-smoke.sh against live server with valid team session cookie and capture output evidence.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Valid call returns 201 with runId + started status.
- Invalid call returns 400 with expected error payload.
- Evidence file/log path attached in task comment.

comments.author: sentinel
comments.text: Blocked in cron context: no authenticated session cookie available. Awaiting Isaac-run evidence or explicit credentialed execution window.

tasks.title: BRS-2026-03-06 Recover stale Ready for Review queue via triage bundles
tasks.description:
Oversized stalled-work recovery item: Ready for Review queue aged >24h has accumulated and requires decomposition into approval-ready bundles.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Decomposed into 30–90 minute child tasks with explicit acceptance criteria.
- At least one unblock child executed in this sweep.
- Recovery plan recorded with stalled list and Isaac decision gate.

tasks.title: BRS-2026-03-06a Build stalled-item triage report + decision matrix
tasks.description:
Generate concise board recovery packet listing all stalled items by rule (In Progress >48h, Ready for Review >24h, Blocked), with concrete recovery plan and next Isaac decision.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Stalled list complete and timestamped.
- Recovery steps prioritized.
- Packet path attached for review.

comments.text: Executed: created RP-0031 with stalled list, decomposition updates, unblock action, and Isaac decision gate.

- Each item has approve/defer recommendation with risk note.
- Output packaged as review packet.
